desc: Toggles the HttpLoggerService on or off.
summary: Toggles the HttpLoggerService on or off. Checks if HttpLoggerService.exe is running — if running, kills it (OFF); if not, starts it (ON). Uses LoggerServiceManager to manage the process lifecycle. Uses CommandFeedback to notify the user of the new state.
usecase: User wants to enable command tracking diagnostics for debugging. User wants to disable the logger service to reduce overhead.
notfor: Viewing logs (use the log panel or MCP tools). Configuring logger settings (use config files).
precondition: No preconditions — works in any Revit state. LoggerServiceManager must be accessible.
postcondition: HttpLoggerService.exe process is either started or stopped. User receives a brief ON/OFF notification via CommandFeedback.

outputs.name: State
outputs.description: New logger state: ON or OFF
